Tver State Medical University, Russia

Atlas Mentor specializes in guiding students through their MBBS study abroad journey, particularly at the Tver State Medical University, Russia.

# Russia

Tver State Medical University, Russia

Established in 1936, Tver State Medical University is one of Russia’s oldest and most reputed medical universities. It operates under the supervision of the Ministry of Health and Social Development and the Ministry of Education of the Russian Federation. For over 70 years, it has been a leader in medical science and training.

The university consistently ranks among the top ten medical educational institutions in Russia. It is a significant center for medical research and education, known for its extensive clinical and laboratory facilities and distinguished teaching staff. The campus includes buildings for practical classes, lectures, laboratory studies, and research.

Tver State Medical University has received the “Prestigious Nations Friendship National Award” for its contributions to international education and collaboration. Currently, over 8000 students, including 500 from India, are studying at the university with 560 academic staff.

The university has 10 hospitals with 6000-bed facilities for clinical education. Its library, established in 1936, is the largest medical library in the region, housing 6100 volumes.

Ranking of Tver State Medical University, Russia

Ranking is a crucial factor for applicants choosing a university for medical studies. According to 4ICU, Tver State Medical University holds a high position both in Russia and globally. It is one of the most preferred medical universities due to its ranking:

  • Russia: 65th
  • World: 2935th

Why Choose Tver State Medical University, Russia?

Choosing the right medical university is a crucial decision for aspiring doctors, and Tver State Medical University stands out as an excellent choice. Established in 1936, it is one of Russia’s oldest and most respected medical institutions. Known for its high rankings, affordable fees, and comprehensive recognition from global medical bodies like the NMC and WHO, Tver State Medical University offers a world-class education. With modern facilities, extensive clinical exposure, and numerous research opportunities, it provides a supportive and enriching environment for medical students from around the world.

  • High Ranking: Tver State Medical University is highly ranked in Russia and globally, making it a preferred choice for medical studies.

  • FMGE Training: The university offers training for the FMGE Exam, with a passing percentage of over 28%, helping students practice in India and other countries.

  • Recognized MBBS Program: The MBBS program is approved by the NMC and WHO, ensuring the degree is recognized worldwide.

  • Affordable Fees: The tuition fees are affordable, providing excellent education at a budget-friendly cost.

  • Comprehensive Recognition: Approved by the Ministry of Education of the Russian Federation, NMC, and WHO, Tver State Medical University is a reputable institution for medical education.

  • Quality Accommodation: The university offers accommodation with modern facilities, providing a comfortable living environment for students.

  • International Partnerships: Tver State Medical University has partnerships and student exchange programs with reputed medical universities in Europe and other parts of the world.

  • Clinical Exposure: Indian students gain ample clinical experience in government hospitals.

  • Research Opportunities: Students can participate in research and scientific activities with senior professors and teachers.

  • Government Accreditation: The university is accredited by the Ministry of Health & Education and the Russian Government.

  • English Medium Instruction: Medical training is conducted primarily in English, eliminating the need for Indian students to learn a new language.

  • Eligibility for PLAB and USMLE: Graduates are eligible to apply for PLAB and USMLE exams.

  • Easy Admission Process: The admission procedure is straightforward, offering students various research and practice opportunities.

  • Practical Training: The university has hospitals and research centers for hands-on medical training.

  • Historic Institution: As one of the oldest medical education institutes in Russia, it offers a rich history and experience in medical education.

  • Safe Environment: The university provides a peaceful and safe environment for international students

Accreditation & Recognition of Tver State Medical University, Russia

Tver State Medical University is globally acknowledged for its excellence in medical education and research. The university’s recognition by several prestigious organizations underscores its commitment to maintaining high standards and providing quality education to its students. These recognitions enhance the university’s credibility and ensure that its graduates are well-prepared for international medical practice.

Tver State Medical University is recognized by the following esteemed organizations:

  • National Medical Commission (NMC): Formerly known as the Medical Council of India (MCI), this recognition allows graduates to practice medicine in India and signifies adherence to high educational standards.

  • Medical Council of Canada (MCC): Recognition by the MCC ensures that graduates can pursue further studies or practice medicine in Canada, reflecting the university’s compliance with Canadian medical education standards.

  • Ministry of Science and Higher Education, Russia: This recognition by a key governmental body in Russia guarantees that the university meets national educational standards for higher learning and scientific research.

  • World Directory of Medical Schools (WDOMS): Listing in the WDOMS indicates that the university is recognized worldwide, enabling graduates to pursue careers or further education in various countries.

  • Education Commission for Foreign Medical Graduates (ECFMG): ECFMG certification allows graduates to apply for residency programs and medical licensure in the United States, demonstrating that the university’s curriculum meets U.S. standards.

  • Foundation for Advancement of International Medical Education and Research (FAIMER): Registration with FAIMER enhances the university’s global standing and facilitates the recognition of its graduates’ credentials in numerous countries.

These recognitions ensure that Tver State Medical University’s graduates are eligible for various international medical examinations and can pursue medical careers or further education worldwide.

Eligibility Criteria for East West University, Georgia

To be eligible for admission to Tver State Medical University’s MBBS program, applicants must meet the following criteria:

Criteria:

  • Candidates must qualify in the NEET Exam to be considered for admission to TSMU.

Academics:

  • A minimum of 50% marks in the 12th class examination.
  • Reserved category candidates require a minimum of 40% marks.
  • Physics, Biology, and Chemistry must be the main subjects in the 12th class examination.

Age:

  • Applicants must be at least 17 years old.
  • Students who turn 17 by December 31st of the admission year are also eligible to apply.

Meeting these criteria ensures that applicants meet the basic requirements necessary to apply and potentially enroll in Tver State Medical University’s MBBS program.

Duration of MBBS at MBBS at Tver State Medical University, Russia

The MBBS program at Tver State Medical University in Russia spans a total of 6 years, structured as follows:

  • 5 Years of Classroom Learning: Comprehensive theoretical and practical education in medical sciences.

  • 1 Year of Apprenticeship: Opportunity for hands-on clinical training and real-time experience in medical practice.

This format is standard across most medical universities in Russia, offering students valuable practical exposure alongside their academic studies.

Documents Required Admission For MBBS at Tver State Medical University, Russia

When applying to Tver State Medical University, it is essential to prepare and submit several documents to ensure a smooth and successful application process. Below is a list of the required documents, along with a brief description of each:

  1. Passport: A valid passport is required for identification and travel purposes.

  2. Tenth and Twelfth Grade Sheets: Official transcripts or mark sheets from your high school education, showing your academic performance.

  3. 6 Passport Size Photographs: Recent passport-sized photographs for identification and administrative purposes.

  4. Medical Insurance and HIV Report Sheet: Proof of medical insurance and a recent HIV test report to ensure health and safety compliance.

  5. Migration Certificate: A certificate from your previous educational institution indicating that you have officially left that institution.

  6. Eligibility Certificate: Issued by the Medical Council if the NEET exam has not been passed in the current year, confirming your eligibility for medical studies.

  7. Birth Certificate: An official document proving your date of birth.

  8. Admit Letter: The official admission letter from Tver State Medical University confirming your acceptance into the program.

  9. Legalization of Documents by Respective Embassies: Verification and legalization of your documents by the relevant embassies to ensure their authenticity.

  10. Visa Fee: Payment for the student visa application fee, necessary for legal entry and stay in Russia.

  11. NEET Score Card: A mandatory document showing your NEET exam score, required for eligibility to study medicine.

Ensuring that all these documents are prepared and submitted correctly will facilitate a smooth application process and help secure your admission to Tver State Medical University.

Faculties at Tver State Medical University, Russia

Tver State Medical University provides a diverse array of educational opportunities through its various faculties, each specializing in distinct areas of medical and healthcare education:

  • Faculty of General Medicine: Offers comprehensive training in general medical practice.

  • Faculty of Dental Medicine: Focuses on dental health and oral care education.

  • Faculty of Pediatrics: Specializes in pediatric medicine and healthcare for children.

  • Faculty of Pharmacy: Provides education in pharmaceutical sciences and drug therapy.

  • Faculty of Advanced Nursing Education: Offers advanced training for nursing professionals.

  • Faculty of Postgraduate Studies: Facilitates specialized education and research opportunities for postgraduate students.

These faculties cater to different aspects of medical education, ensuring that students receive specialized knowledge and skills necessary for their chosen healthcare professions.

Benefits Of Studying MBBS At Tver State Medical University, Russia

Studying MBBS at Tver State Medical University in Russia offers numerous advantages:

  • Affordable Fees: The university offers affordable MBBS fees specifically for Indian students.

  • Global Recognition: Recognized by ECFMG, WDOMS, FAIMER, NMC, and medical councils of Canada, Australia, etc., ensuring graduates can practice medicine worldwide.

  • Quality Education: Provides high-quality medical education combining theoretical knowledge with practical training.

  • Global Practice: Graduates can pursue medical practice internationally upon completion of their degree.

  • English Medium Instruction: Instruction is primarily in English, facilitating better understanding for international students.

  • Modern Facilities: Includes well-furnished hostels with basic amenities, Indian mess facilities, state-of-the-art infrastructure with laboratories, classrooms, libraries, and sports facilities.

  • Exam Eligibility: Students are eligible to apply for PLAB and USMLE exams, opening avenues for further career advancement.

Studying at Tver State Medical University not only ensures a comprehensive medical education but also prepares students for successful careers in healthcare worldwide.

Student Life at Tver State Medical University, Russia

At Tver State Medical University, student life is vibrant and supportive, offering a range of amenities and cultural activities that enrich the educational experience:

  • Accommodation: The university provides four major hostels equipped with centrally heated air-conditioning, private facilities, kitchenettes, and WiFi, ensuring a comfortable living environment for over eighteen hundred students at affordable fees.

  • Cafeteria: Offers a variety of cuisines, including Indian dishes, alongside local favorites, emphasizing hygiene and quality.

  • Cultural Activities: The university celebrates Indian festivals such as Diwali, Holi, and Baisakhi through its Indian Student Association, fostering a diverse cultural environment. Additionally, it organizes sports tournaments like Tennis, Cricket, Football, Basketball, and Badminton, promoting holistic development and confidence among students.

  • Student Support Units: Includes facilities like the General Purpose Cultural Centre, Office of Pedagogical Work, Indian Cultural Centre, and the Youth Centre, providing platforms for students to showcase and enhance their talents.

The student-oriented approach at Tver State Medical University ensures that students not only receive quality education but also have enriching experiences that contribute to their personal and professional growth.
